scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run setup
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:backend:smoke && npm run test:frontend
scripts.prebuild: npm ci --prefix backend --include=dev && npm ci --prefix frontend --include=dev
